creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hey folks, what's the progress on this PR?

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=108801

If there's no outlook on a committable fix, I'd suggest closing the PR.

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

The rule of software licences:
If it doesn't fit on your screen, it's probably too complex to
understand.
